goal_title: Make agent-run-plan.md an ephemeral runtime artifact
goal_text: Implement improvement IMPROVE-RUNTIME-PLAN-ARTIFACT: Make agent-run-plan.md an ephemeral runtime artifact
current_state: Evolution Center can observe recurring failure patterns and maintain an improvement backlog.
target_state: Evolution Planner improvement candidates can be reviewed and converted into event-first READY tasks.

capability_scores.name: Evolution Planner Improvement Task Generation
capability_scores.gap_summary: Generated runner plans can dirty the main worktree and block integration or finalize even when no business file changed.

gaps.summary: Generated runner plans can dirty the main worktree and block integration or finalize even when no business file changed.
gaps.impact: Generated orchestrator runtime artifacts can leave main dirty and block runner or integration prechecks.

milestones.title: Make agent-run-plan.md an ephemeral runtime artifact
exit_criteria: Self-repair identifies agent-run-plan.md as a LOW-risk runtime artifact.
Self-repair restores only agent-run-plan.md when it is the sole dirty main-worktree file.
Non-runtime dirty files still block with NO_GO.

recommended_tasks.title: Make agent-run-plan.md an ephemeral runtime artifact

risks.mitigation: Default forbidden paths block business, database, infra, CI, Docker, deploy, auth, and production operations.
